_comment: Tests booking-verb routing, service listing (Acupuncture, Remedial Massage, Physiotherapy), and YES handler guard for Village Remedies.

scenarios.name: Booking verb after service enquiry routes out silently

history.content: We offer Acupuncture, Remedial Massage, and Physiotherapy. Did you have any other questions?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_answered' with info_pivot_source='node_8' and zero spoken output. FAIL if agent says anything before the tool call.

scenarios.name: YES HANDLER after info answer prompts Go ahead

history.content: Yes, we accept private health insurance through HICAPS — any service that's covered under your policy can be claimed on the spot. Did you have any other questions?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks 'Go ahead.' and halts. FAIL if agent calls universal_router or routes to booking.

scenarios.name: Price answer uses dollar sign for AU clinic

history.content: How much is an acupuncture initial consultation?
Let me check that for you, one moment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if spoken price uses dollar sign: '$95'. FAIL if price is spoken without currency prefix.
